entry.title: Database degraded performance
entry.content: investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Database is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Notifications & Email degraded performance
entry.content: investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Notifications & Email is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: HR & Organization degraded performance
entry.content: investigating — Automated monitoring detected that HR & Organization is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Social Feed degraded performance
entry.content: investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Social Feed is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Authentication & SSO degraded performance
entry.content: investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Authentication & SSO is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.

entry.title: Application API outage
entry.content: investigating — Automated monitoring detected that Application API is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.
